name: High Sierra Technologies, Inc.
business: High Sierra Technologies, Inc. licenses intellectual property for modifying cannabis and hemp products by removing or reducing volatile organic compounds, and also plans to produce and market low-odor hemp cigarettes through a joint venture. The company holds three issued U.S. patents for its technology.
sellsTo: licensed producers, processors, and manufacturers of cannabis and hemp products in U.S. states and Canadian provinces where legal
potential tobacco companies entering the cannabis and hemp marketplaces

exposures.sentence: The Company's business is now focused on the business of its wholly-owned subsidiary, High Sierra Technologies, Inc. (High Sierra).

catalysts.sentence: This Patent was issued as United States Patent Number 10,737,198 on August 11, 2020.
United States Patent Number 10,835,839 on November 17, 2020.
On May 24, 2022, the United States Patent and Trademark Office issued United States Patent Number 11,338,222 to the Company...

catalysts.event: Joint Venture Agreement executed with Hempacco Co., Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On November 17, 2022, the Company's wholly-owned subsidiary, High Sierra executed a Joint Venture Agreement (the Joint Venture Agreement) with Hempacco Co., Inc. (Hempacco) for the production, marketing, and sales of hemp smokables...

tamClaims.claim: Global cannabis market worth $7.7 billion with 60% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report by the Brightfield Group, the global cannabis market is currently estimated to be worth $7.7 billion and will likely experience a compound annual growth rate of 60 percent as other countries liberalize their marijuana laws.

tamClaims.claim: International cannabis market projected to hit $51.1 billion by 2025
tamClaims.sentence: The international market for cannabis is projected to hit $51.1 billion by 2025 according to New Frontier Data.

tamClaims.claim: North American cannabis sales $35.6 billion in 2023, $41.5 billion by 2025
tamClaims.sentence: New Frontier Data has estimated that North American cannabis sales could reach $35.6 billion in 2023 and $41.5 billion by 2025.

If trends for tobacco cigarettes are an indication of future cannabis cigarette sales, flavored cannabis cigarettes could represent a market of $8.84 billion (based on $29.4 billion total 2021 cannabis sales).

tamClaims.claim: Hemp/CBD market from $108 million in 2014 to $1.8 billion in 2023 to $16.2 billion by 2033
tamClaims.sentence: These are markets that Statista has estimated will grow from $108 million in 2014 to $1.8 billion in 2023 and growing to $16.2 billion by 2033.
